name: Shoulder-to-Overhead (2010 Games)

movements.notes: athlete's own 1-rep-max; no fixed Rx weight

source_notes: games.crossfit.com/workouts/games/2010/2 (official CrossFit Games event, individual division), retrieved 2026-07-10; must be completed within 12 minutes of the start of Max Rep Deadlift, immediately following it on the same clock
